items.title: Jim Cramer Discusses Kura Oncology as a Speculative Bet
items.description: Kura Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ:KURA) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer offered insights on. When a caller highlighted the company’s $135 million milestone payment owing to its U.S. commercial sale of KOMZIFTI, Cramer commented: “That’s a lot. That is a lot… Now, just understand that, yeah, they are milestone payments, not actual. Now, here’s what […]
